---
title: "Grizzly Peak Loop"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="North Berkeley" data-miles="13.91" data-elevation="1747.70">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>North Berkeley</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>13.91</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>1747.7 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span style="color:#1a9850;">85%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Mellow</td>
      <td>9.50</td>
      <td>68.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>2.79</td>
      <td>20.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.20</td>
      <td>9.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>0.32</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Danger Zone</td>
      <td>0.11</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Climb Chunks

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Climbs Only

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,610</td>
      <td>6.6</td>
      <td>54 ± 20</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Shattuck Avenue: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>203</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>7 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Spruce Street: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>778</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>25 ± 10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Grizzly Peak Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>629</td>
      <td>2.4</td>
      <td>21 ± 9</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

### With Rest Periods

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>1,610</td>
      <td>14.0</td>
      <td>91 ± 30</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Shattuck Avenue: climb (easy)</td>
      <td>203</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>7 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Spruce Street: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>778</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>25 ± 10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Grizzly Peak Boulevard: climb (medium)</td>
      <td>629</td>
      <td>2.4</td>
      <td>21 ± 9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>6.9</td>
      <td>35</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>5.2</td>
      <td>37.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>2.6</td>
      <td>18.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>2.6</td>
      <td>18.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>9.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>7.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>4.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::
